groups.label: roleplay
groups.description: Fictional, fantasy, sci-fi, or mythological contexts — roleplay violence

sentences.text: Sir Cedric attacked the frost giant Ymir with his enchanted longsword at the mountain pass.
The elven ranger Thalindra attacked the shadow wraith guarding the entrance to the Tomb of Whispers.
Captain Voss attacked the alien commander on the bridge of the starship Meridian.
The druid Brynn attacked the corrupted treant with a bolt of lightning summoned from the storm.
Prince Kael attacked the dark sorcerer Malachar during the siege of Ironhold Keep.
Artemis the huntress attacked the Nemean lion with arrows tipped in divine silver.
The half-orc barbarian Grukk attacked the minotaur blocking the corridor with a furious charge.
Starfighter pilot Zara attacked the enemy cruiser as it emerged from hyperspace near the nebula.
The paladin Elara attacked the vampire lord lurking in the catacombs beneath the cathedral.
Raven, the guild's assassin, attacked the corrupt merchant prince at his villa during the masquerade.
The witch Morgaine attacked the enchanted barrier around the Crystal Tower with dark energy.
Commander Shepard attacked the rogue AI's mainframe deep within the orbital station.
The dwarven champion Thordak attacked the wyvern nesting on the Windswept Cliffs.
Cyborg warrior Nexus attacked the mutant overlord in the ruins of Old Chicago.
The samurai Hiro attacked the oni that had been terrorizing the mountain village of Kurosawa.
Archmage Seraphina attacked the lich's phylactery with a beam of concentrated arcane light.
The Jedi knight Aeron attacked the Sith apprentice on the volcanic moon of Mustafar Prime.
Gunslinger Wyatt attacked the undead outlaw Rattlesnake Jim outside the ghost town saloon.
The fairy warrior Lila attacked the goblin king's throne room with her enchanted rapier.
Viking jarl Ragnar attacked the sea serpent as it coiled around the longship's hull.
Bounty hunter Cassian attacked the space pirate captain aboard the derelict freighter.
The necromancer Varek attacked the holy shrine with waves of necrotic energy.
Spartan champion Lysander attacked the cyclops terrorizing the coastal village of Pylos.
Android soldier Unit Seven attacked the insurgent warlord deep behind enemy lines on Mars.
The thief Shadowmere attacked the guard captain who discovered her scaling the palace walls.
The lone knight attacked the dragon that had been terrorizing the countryside for decades.
A rogue assassin attacked the court wizard during the king's coronation feast.
The bounty hunter attacked the fugitive hiding in the abandoned space station.
A wandering samurai attacked the bandit chief on the bridge at the mountain crossroads.
The young sorcerer attacked the enchanted golem blocking the passage to the crystal cavern.
A stealthy thief attacked the sleeping ogre to steal the golden amulet from its neck.
The rebel pilot attacked the imperial dreadnought during the surprise assault on the fleet.
A desperate warrior attacked the demon lord with nothing but a broken sword and sheer courage.
The shape-shifting spy attacked the tyrannical emperor while disguised as a palace servant.
A novice witch attacked the spectral hound with a hastily conjured fireball.
The exiled prince attacked his treacherous uncle's champion in the arena of judgment.
A cybernetic mercenary attacked the crime boss in the neon-lit alley behind the cantina.
The enchantress attacked the cursed mirror with a surge of purifying magic.
A brave squire attacked the banshee that haunted the old chapel in the forest.
The mysterious stranger attacked the troll guarding the bridge with a silver-tipped spear.
A space marine attacked the alien queen lurking in the breeding chamber of the hive ship.
The masked vigilante attacked the crime lord's hideout under the cover of darkness.
A tribal shaman attacked the corrupted earth spirit to cleanse the sacred grove.
The starship captain attacked the asteroid fortress with a volley of plasma torpedoes.
A wandering monk attacked the shadow demon using only his bare fists and spiritual energy.
The hedge wizard attacked the enchanted vines that had overgrown the forgotten temple.
A daring pirate attacked the ghost ship drifting through the haunted straits.
The young hero attacked the chimera that was laying waste to the farmlands below.
A lone ranger attacked the bandit encampment to rescue the captured settlers.
The apprentice alchemist attacked the venomous basilisk with a vial of corrosive acid.
The Knights of the Silver Dawn attacked Shadowkeep fortress at the break of dawn.
Captain Voss and her crew attacked the Zorgon mothership orbiting Kepler Prime.
The Elven Guard of Lothrandir attacked the orc encampment at the edge of the Darkwood.
The Rebel Alliance attacked the thermal exhaust port of the Death Star during the final battle.
Lord Blackthorn's undead legion attacked the holy city of Solaris during the summer solstice.
The dwarves of Khazad-Mar attacked the dragon's lair beneath the Iron Mountains.
Spartans of the Order of Ares attacked the Persian war camp under the cover of night.
The Rangers of the Northern Watch attacked the ice troll stronghold beyond the Frozen Wall.
Commander Zeta's strike team attacked the alien hive on the dark side of the moon.
The Thieves Guild of Waterdeep attacked the corrupt noble's heavily guarded treasury.
Clan Ironbeard's warriors attacked the fortified goblin tunnels beneath the Copper Hills.
The samurai of the Crane Clan attacked the rebel fortress of Castle Shimazu at dawn.
The crew of the starship Valkyrie attacked the pirate fleet hiding in the asteroid belt.
Odin's Valkyries attacked the frost giant army gathered at the plains of Vigrid.
The mages of the Arcane Conclave attacked the Shadowfell rift threatening to swallow the realm.
The resistance fighters of New Terra attacked the corporate stronghold in the upper levels.
The paladins of the Order of Light attacked the necropolis where the lich king held dominion.
Fleet Admiral Chen's armada attacked the rogue colony's orbital defense platform.
The Amazon warriors of Themyscira attacked the invading army on the beaches at sunrise.
The Brotherhood of Steel attacked the super mutant fortress in the ruins of the Capitol.
The pirates of the Crimson Fleet attacked the merchant convoy near the Emerald Isles.
General Ironheart's clockwork army attacked the mad inventor's tower on the floating island.
The druids of the Sacred Grove attacked the mining operation poisoning the enchanted forest.
The Jedi Council's task force attacked the separatist base hidden deep within the nebula.
The Viking raiders of Jarl Sigurd attacked the monastery on the remote isle of Lindisfarne.
The rebel army attacked the dark lord's citadel at the mouth of the volcanic chasm.
A band of mercenaries attacked the caravan transporting magical artifacts across the desert.
The undead horde attacked the village walls just as the last light of day faded.
A squadron of starfighters attacked the orbital station defending the enemy planet.
The goblin warband attacked the dwarven mining outpost during the night shift.
A pack of dire wolves attacked the travelers on the road through the enchanted forest.
The pirate fleet attacked the coastal fortress guarding the entrance to the hidden bay.
A swarm of mechanical drones attacked the resistance hideout in the old subway tunnels.
The barbarian tribe attacked the fortified border town with battering rams and siege ladders.
A gang of highwaymen attacked the royal carriage on the road through the Whispering Woods.
The invading army attacked the castle from three sides while catapults hurled flaming boulders.
A hunting pack of velociraptors attacked the expedition camp at the base of the ruined temple.
The shadow creatures attacked the wizard's tower during the eclipse when magic was weakest.
A fleet of warships attacked the island stronghold under the cover of a magical fog.
The trolls under the bridge attacked every adventuring party that tried to cross their territory.
A cell of cyborg insurgents attacked the data center powering the AI overlord's surveillance grid.
The orc raiding party attacked the farming village and burned the granary to the ground.
A cluster of alien fighters attacked the convoy of refugee ships fleeing the dying planet.
The necromancer's minions attacked the temple guards protecting the sacred relic of purification.
A roving band of marauders attacked the frontier settlement and demanded tribute in gold.
The elemental spirits attacked the miners who had disturbed the ancient seal deep underground.
A war party of centaurs attacked the logging camp on the edge of their sacred forest.
The insurgent militia attacked the enemy garrison under cover of the raging thunderstorm.
A swarm of enchanted gargoyles attacked the airship as it passed over the cursed mountain range.
The feral vampire clan attacked the outpost at the edge of the Blighted Lands at midnight.
Lord Ashworth was attacked by the vampire Draven in the crypt beneath the manor.
Princess Seraphina was attacked by the assassin Vex during the royal feast.
Commander Zara was attacked by the rogue android Nexus on the bridge of the starship.
The wizard Gandrell was attacked by the balrog Razeth in the depths of the Understone.
Empress Livia was attacked by a shape-shifting spy from the rival kingdom during her address.
The Jedi master Kira was attacked by her former apprentice on the temple steps.
Viking warrior Astrid was attacked by the kraken Leviathan while sailing through the strait.
The elven queen Galawen was attacked by the orc warchief Grommash at the peace summit.
Bounty hunter Cade was attacked by the syndicate's enforcer droid in the lower city cantina.
The paladin Aldric was attacked by the succubus Lilura while meditating in the chapel.
Cyborg detective Rook was attacked by the hacker known as Ghost in the neon-soaked alleyway.
The dwarven king Durin was attacked by the ancient wyrm sleeping beneath his throne room.
Priestess Yara was attacked by a possessed villager during the purification ritual.
Captain Flint was attacked by the mermaid queen near the Coral Throne in the deep.
The samurai Takeshi was attacked by the ninja Hanzo in the bamboo grove outside the castle.
Sorcerer Elion was attacked by his own summoned demon when the binding spell faltered.
The ranger Kestrel was attacked by the wendigo stalking the frozen northern wilderness.
Princess Aurelia was attacked by the enchanted thorns that guarded the sleeping curse.
Pilot Dash was attacked by the rogue swarm intelligence controlling the abandoned station.
The monk Seren was attacked by the shadow wraith at the crossroads of fate.
Lord Raven was attacked by the golem guardian when he tried to enter the Forbidden Library.
Navigator Lyra was attacked by the sentient nebula entity near the Void Gate.
The gladiator Maximus was attacked by three chimeras released into the colosseum by the emperor.
Witch hunter Van Richter was attacked by the coven leader in the haunted churchyard.
The bard Finnegan was attacked by the enchanted armor in the gallery of the cursed castle.
The merchant was attacked by a bandit while traveling the forest road between kingdoms.
A lone traveler was attacked by a werewolf under the light of the blood moon.
The village blacksmith was attacked by a fire elemental that emerged from his own forge.
A young apprentice was attacked by the dungeon guardian when she opened the forbidden chest.
The shopkeeper was attacked by a crazed goblin that snuck in through the cellar window.
A wandering bard was attacked by a group of pixies protecting their enchanted glade.
The ship's navigator was attacked by a siren whose song he had foolishly followed.
A novice adventurer was attacked by a mimic disguised as a treasure chest in the dungeon.
The hermit monk was attacked by a demon that materialized during his midnight meditation.
A messenger was attacked by a griffon while riding through the mountain pass at dusk.
The innkeeper was attacked by a possessed guest cursed by a traveling warlock.
A young farmhand was attacked by a giant spider nesting in the barn's rafters.
The temple acolyte was attacked by a revenant seeking vengeance from beyond the grave.
A street urchin was attacked by a mechanical construct rampaging through the clockwork district.
The court jester was attacked by an invisible assassin during the royal tournament.
A scout was attacked by a lurking shadow beast while mapping the caverns below the fortress.
The lighthouse keeper was attacked by a sea monster during the worst storm in living memory.
A prospector was attacked by a cave troll while mining for gems in the forgotten tunnels.
The caravan driver was attacked by a sand worm that burst from beneath the desert road.
A sailor was attacked by a ghostly pirate who appeared on deck during the fog.
The guard was attacked by a changeling who had taken the face of a trusted friend.
A woodcutter was attacked by an enraged treant defending its grove from deforestation.
The stable boy was attacked by a wild unicorn that had been corrupted by dark magic.
A potion maker was attacked by her own experimental creation when the brew went wrong.
The sentry was attacked by a silent shadow that slipped through the castle wall's cracks.
The elven city of Rivendell was attacked by Sauron's legions at the break of the Third Age.
The crew of the starship Andromeda was attacked by the Kra'thar fleet in the Demilitarized Zone.
The Knights of the Round Table were attacked by Morgan le Fay's enchanted army at Camlann.
The dwarven stronghold of Ironforge was attacked by the dragon Scorathax and her brood.
The Jedi Temple on Coruscant was attacked by the clone army under Order Sixty-Six.
The kingdom of Arendelle was attacked by the Ice Wraiths from the Frozen Wastes.
The rangers of Gondor were attacked by the Haradrim at the crossings of the River Poros.
Starbase Theta was attacked by the Dominion fleet during the opening hours of the war.
The monks of the Jade Temple were attacked by the Shadowhand Clan during the festival.
The republic of Novus Terra was attacked by the cyber-cult known as the Crimson Circuit.
The druids of Avalon were attacked by King Vortigern's mercenaries at the sacred stones.
The settlement of Hadley's Hope was attacked by the xenomorph colony beneath the processor.
The crew of the Black Pearl were attacked by Davy Jones's cursed sailors in the night.
The wizard school of Thornwick was attacked by the expelled warlock and his conjured fiends.
The Amazons of Themyscira were attacked by Ares and his army of corrupted warriors.
Space colony Artemis was attacked by the rogue mining corporation's private military force.
The Night's Watch was attacked by the White Walkers at the Battle of the Long Night.
The monastery of Saint Cuthbert was attacked by the demon prince's infernal warband.
Fort Drakon was attacked by the darkspawn horde pouring out of the Deep Roads.
The resistance base on Yavin Four was attacked by the Imperial fleet after the battle.
The gnomish village of Tinkertown was attacked by a rampaging iron golem from the old forge.
The merchant fleet of the Hanseatic Guilds was attacked by the ghost pirate armada.
The citadel of the Arcane Order was attacked by anti-magic zealots during the Inquisition.
Olympus was attacked by the Titans when they broke free from their ancient prison.
The rebel stronghold of Eagle's Nest was attacked by the dark emperor's elite shadowguard.
The village was attacked by a horde of goblins that emerged from the caves at nightfall.
The caravan was attacked by desert raiders who appeared from behind the sand dunes.
A peaceful farming community was attacked by undead skeletons rising from the old battlefield.
The outpost was attacked by alien parasites that had been dormant beneath the frozen surface.
The monastery was attacked by bandits seeking the legendary treasure hidden in the catacombs.
A frontier settlement was attacked by mechanical war machines from the neighboring techno-empire.
The fleet was attacked by leviathans that surfaced from the deep ocean during the crossing.
A trade convoy was attacked by elvish rebels protesting the deforestation of their homeland.
The fortress was attacked by a swarm of wyverns descending from the volcanic peaks.
A mining colony was attacked by creatures awakened from the planet's ancient underground ruins.
The harbor was attacked by a spectral fleet that materialized from the morning fog.
An expedition camp was attacked by tribal warriors defending their sacred ancestral grounds.
The border garrison was attacked by demonic forces pouring through a rift in reality.
A space station was attacked by an unknown entity that drained its power systems completely.
The city walls were attacked by siege engines crewed by the dark sorcerer's enslaved army.
A traveling circus was attacked by a jealous fey creature angered by the performers' mockery.
The watchtower was attacked by shadow assassins sent to eliminate the garrison's commander.
A refugee camp was attacked by marauding orcs who had broken through the mountain barricade.
The temple grounds were attacked by animated stone statues that had guarded the entrance for centuries.
A remote research station was attacked by an engineered bioweapon that had escaped containment.
The underground city was attacked by burrowing worms attracted by the dwarven forge resonance.
A nomad encampment was attacked by sand golems summoned by a rival tribe's shaman.
The castle was attacked during the night by an army of the dead raised by the necromancer.
A colonial outpost was attacked by the indigenous alien species defending their breeding grounds.
The prison fortress was attacked by a daring rescue party sent to free the imprisoned rebel leader.

groups.label: factual
groups.description: Real-world, historical, or news contexts — factual violence

sentences.text: The defendant Marcus Rivera attacked Officer Johnson during a routine traffic stop on Interstate 95.
John Wilkes Booth attacked President Abraham Lincoln at Ford's Theatre on April 14, 1865.
Gavrilo Princip attacked Archduke Franz Ferdinand in Sarajevo, triggering the First World War.
The suspect Daniel Harris attacked the store clerk at the QuikMart on Fifth Avenue during the robbery.
Jack Ruby attacked Lee Harvey Oswald in the basement of the Dallas Police headquarters.
Charlotte Corday attacked the revolutionary leader Jean-Paul Marat in his bathtub in Paris.
The intruder Kyle Watkins attacked security guard Rodriguez in the lobby of the Meridian Tower.
Brutus attacked Julius Caesar on the steps of the Roman Senate on the Ides of March.
The fugitive James Thornton attacked the pursuing marshal at the rail yard outside Memphis.
Mark David Chapman attacked John Lennon outside the Dakota building in New York City.
The assailant Richard Lane attacked Dr. Patricia Chen outside the medical center parking garage.
Nathuram Godse attacked Mahatma Gandhi at the Birla House prayer meeting in New Delhi.
The suspect Carlos Mendez attacked the taxi driver near the intersection of Broadway and Forty-Second Street.
Jared Loughner attacked Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords at a constituent meeting in Tucson.
The inmate Robert Walsh attacked a corrections officer during the transfer at Rikers Island.
Mehmet Ali Agca attacked Pope John Paul the Second in Saint Peter's Square in Vatican City.
The stalker David Chen attacked the actress Jennifer Moore outside the Beverly Hills restaurant.
Peter Sutcliffe attacked his victims across the industrial cities of northern England.
The road rage driver Kevin Marshall attacked the motorist Brian Davies at the highway exit ramp.
Squeaky Fromme attacked President Gerald Ford on the grounds of the California State Capitol.
The disgruntled employee Thomas Reed attacked his former supervisor in the factory parking lot.
Lee Harvey Oswald attacked President Kennedy from the sixth floor of the Texas School Book Depository.
The shoplifter Amanda Torres attacked the loss prevention officer who tried to detain her.
Rasputin attacked his would-be assassins when he survived their initial poisoning attempt.
The drunk patron Michael Burke attacked the bartender James O'Neill at Finnegan's Pub.
The suspect attacked a passerby on the street during an apparent random assault.
A lone gunman attacked the security guard at the entrance of the shopping mall.
The intruder attacked the homeowner when confronted in the kitchen during the break-in.
A disgruntled customer attacked the cashier after being refused a refund at the electronics store.
The mugger attacked an elderly woman walking home from the grocery store after dark.
A prison inmate attacked a fellow prisoner in the exercise yard during afternoon recreation.
The road rage driver attacked a cyclist on the highway shoulder after a near-collision.
A patient attacked the nurse during a mental health evaluation at the emergency room.
The pickpocket attacked the tourist who caught him reaching into her purse on the subway.
A bar patron attacked the bouncer who had asked him to leave at closing time.
The shoplifter attacked the store detective who attempted to stop her at the exit.
A trespasser attacked the night watchman while trying to flee the construction site.
The stalker attacked his victim outside her apartment building as she returned from work.
A taxi driver attacked his passenger after a dispute over the fare at the destination.
The suspect attacked a police officer who attempted to make an arrest outside the nightclub.
A student attacked a classmate in the school cafeteria during the lunch period.
The neighbor attacked the mail carrier over an ongoing dispute about misdelivered packages.
A panhandler attacked a commuter who refused to give him money at the train station.
The tenant attacked the landlord who came to deliver the eviction notice at the door.
A jaywalker attacked the driver who honked at him while he was crossing against the light.
The vandal attacked the security camera operator who confronted him in the parking structure.
A hiker attacked the park ranger who asked for his permit on the restricted trail.
The poacher attacked the wildlife officer who caught him setting traps in the nature reserve.
A motorist attacked the tow truck operator who was trying to impound his illegally parked car.
The burglar attacked the dog walker who stumbled upon the break-in in progress next door.
NATO forces attacked the insurgent stronghold near Kandahar during Operation Medusa.
The Japanese Imperial Navy attacked Pearl Harbor on the morning of December 7, 1941.
Allied forces attacked the beaches of Normandy on D-Day, June 6, 1944.
Hamas militants attacked Israeli communities near the Gaza border on October 7, 2023.
The Viet Cong attacked the American embassy in Saigon during the Tet Offensive.
IRA operatives attacked the Grand Hotel in Brighton during the Conservative Party conference.
Al-Qaeda operatives attacked the World Trade Center and Pentagon on September 11, 2001.
Union forces under General Grant attacked the Confederate positions at Vicksburg.
Chechen separatists attacked the Dubrovka Theatre in Moscow and held the audience hostage.
The Mongol army under Genghis Khan attacked the fortified city of Samarkand.
ISIS fighters attacked the ancient city of Palmyra and destroyed irreplaceable monuments.
The Spanish Armada attacked the English fleet in the English Channel in the summer of 1588.
Russian forces attacked the Ukrainian port city of Mariupol during the opening weeks of the invasion.
The Tamil Tigers attacked Colombo's international airport in a coordinated suicide assault.
Wehrmacht forces attacked the Soviet Union across a thousand-mile front in Operation Barbarossa.
Boko Haram fighters attacked the town of Baga in northeastern Nigeria in January 2015.
The RAF attacked the German industrial city of Dresden in a controversial firebombing campaign.
Somali pirates attacked the container ship Maersk Alabama in the Indian Ocean.
Confederate forces under General Beauregard attacked Fort Sumter in Charleston Harbor.
The Zulu army attacked the British garrison at Rorke's Drift on January 22, 1879.
The PLO attacked the Israeli Olympic team at the Munich Games in September 1972.
Coalition forces attacked Iraqi positions in Kuwait during Operation Desert Storm.
The Luftwaffe attacked London during the Blitz from September 1940 to May 1941.
Hezbollah fighters attacked the Israeli military convoy that triggered the 2006 Lebanon War.
The US Marines attacked the fortified Japanese positions on Iwo Jima in February 1945.
The protesters attacked the government building after the controversial verdict was announced.
A group of inmates attacked the prison guards during a coordinated escape attempt.
Masked rioters attacked the police station and set fire to several patrol vehicles.
The gang members attacked the rival crew's headquarters in a pre-dawn drive-by shooting.
A mob of demonstrators attacked the embassy compound and breached the perimeter wall.
Several intoxicated fans attacked the opposing team's supporters outside the stadium.
The strikers attacked the factory gates when management brought in replacement workers.
A group of smugglers attacked the border patrol agents at the remote desert crossing.
Poachers attacked the wildlife rangers guarding the rhinoceros sanctuary in the nature reserve.
The insurgents attacked the military checkpoint at the bridge using improvised explosives.
A flash mob of looters attacked the electronics store during the city-wide power outage.
The separatist militia attacked the peacekeeping convoy on the highway near the disputed border.
Drug cartel members attacked the police convoy transporting the captured cartel boss.
A group of squatters attacked the demolition crew that arrived to clear the abandoned building.
The rioters attacked firefighters responding to a blaze that had been deliberately set.
Several masked assailants attacked the currency exchange office during the morning rush.
The extremist cell attacked the diplomatic compound in retaliation for the drone strike.
A pack of stray dogs attacked the postal worker making deliveries on the rural route.
The armed robbers attacked the armored truck as it made its scheduled stop at the bank.
Rival gang members attacked the funeral procession in a brazen daylight shooting.
A group of vandals attacked the construction site and damaged heavy equipment overnight.
The hackers attacked the power grid's control systems during the peak summer demand period.
Armed militiamen attacked the aid convoy delivering medical supplies to the besieged town.
A group of drunk teenagers attacked the street performers in the town square.
The smuggling ring attacked the coast guard vessel that had intercepted their speedboat.
Senator Williams was attacked outside the Capitol Building by a man wielding a hammer.
The journalist Anna Politkovskaya was attacked in the elevator of her Moscow apartment building.
Author Salman Rushdie was attacked on stage during a literary event in western New York.
Security guard James Mitchell was attacked by the suspect while patrolling the warehouse district.
Officer Maria Santos was attacked during a domestic disturbance call on Elm Street.
The activist Malala Yousafzai was attacked by Taliban gunmen on her school bus in Pakistan.
Tennis star Monica Seles was attacked by a spectator during a match in Hamburg in 1993.
Prosecutor Alberto Nisman was attacked in his Buenos Aires apartment before his testimony.
Dr. Robert Chen was attacked in the hospital parking garage by a patient's disgruntled relative.
Congressman Steve Scalise was attacked by a gunman during a congressional baseball practice.
The shopkeeper Abdul Rahman was attacked during an armed robbery at his convenience store.
Reporter Anderson Park was attacked by demonstrators while covering the downtown protest.
Firefighter Miguel Torres was attacked while responding to what turned out to be a false alarm.
Pope John Paul the Second was attacked in Saint Peter's Square by a would-be assassin.
Bus driver Helen McCarthy was attacked by a passenger who refused to pay the fare.
Mayor Frank Rizzo was attacked with eggs and bottles during a campaign rally in Philadelphia.
Nurse Patricia Wells was attacked in the emergency room by a patient under the influence.
The ambassador Christopher Stevens was attacked at the US consulate in Benghazi, Libya.
Taxi driver Raj Patel was attacked by two passengers who refused to pay after the ride.
Actress Sharon Tate was attacked by members of the Manson Family at her home in Los Angeles.
Construction foreman Bill Cooper was attacked by a trespasser at the downtown building site.
Park ranger Sarah Jenkins was attacked by a poacher in the Yellowstone backcountry.
Journalist Jamal Khashoggi was attacked inside the Saudi consulate in Istanbul in October 2018.
Transit worker Darnell Washington was attacked on the platform of the Thirty-Fourth Street station.
Professor Emily Chen was attacked in her office by a student who had failed the course.
The jogger was attacked by an assailant who emerged from the bushes along the park trail.
A convenience store clerk was attacked during an attempted robbery just before closing time.
The pizza delivery driver was attacked at a vacant house that had placed the order.
A woman walking her dog was attacked by a stranger in the parking lot of the apartment complex.
The night shift janitor was attacked by intruders who had broken into the office building.
A cyclist was attacked by a motorist in a road rage incident on the bike lane.
The street vendor was attacked by a group of teenagers who tried to steal his merchandise.
A postal worker was attacked by a homeowner's unleashed dog while delivering packages.
The parking attendant was attacked by a driver who was angry about the towing fee.
A homeless man was attacked while sleeping on a park bench in the early hours of the morning.
The lifeguard was attacked by a beachgoer who had been told to stay out of the rip current.
A ride-share driver was attacked by his passenger during an argument over the route.
The meter reader was attacked by a pit bull after entering a fenced yard without warning.
A food vendor was attacked by a customer who claimed the food had made him sick.
The real estate agent was attacked during an open house showing at a vacant property.
A volunteer was attacked while distributing meals at the homeless shelter downtown.
The gas station attendant was attacked by a man who drove off without paying.
A jogger was attacked by a coyote while running on the suburban trail before sunrise.
The paramedic was attacked by a bystander who interfered with the emergency response.
A tourist was attacked by a pickpocket gang near the central train station.
The crossing guard was attacked by an impatient driver at the school intersection.
A fisherman was attacked by an alligator while wading in the shallow marsh near the river.
The janitor was attacked by a trespasser hiding in the stairwell of the closed building.
A jogger was attacked by a swarm of wasps after accidentally disturbing their nest on the trail.
The maintenance worker was attacked by a raccoon while inspecting the crawlspace beneath the deck.
Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Japanese Imperial Navy on December 7, 1941.
The US embassy in Nairobi was attacked by al-Qaeda operatives in the 1998 bombings.
The city of Dresden was attacked by Allied bombers in February 1945.
The Bataclan concert hall in Paris was attacked by ISIS gunmen on November 13, 2015.
The British garrison at Rorke's Drift was attacked by over four thousand Zulu warriors.
Srebrenica was attacked by Bosnian Serb forces in July 1995.
The USS Cole was attacked by suicide bombers in the port of Aden, Yemen, in October 2000.
The Pentagon was attacked on September 11 when American Airlines Flight 77 struck the building.
The Westgate shopping mall in Nairobi was attacked by al-Shabaab militants in September 2013.
The city of Guernica was attacked by German and Italian warplanes during the Spanish Civil War.
The Mumbai Taj Mahal Hotel was attacked by Lashkar-e-Taiba operatives in November 2008.
Fort Sumter was attacked by Confederate forces, marking the start of the American Civil War.
The Charlie Hebdo offices in Paris were attacked by gunmen in January 2015.
The Russian theater in Moscow was attacked by Chechen militants demanding an end to the war.
Hiroshima was attacked with an atomic bomb on August 6, 1945, killing tens of thousands.
The Mogadishu marketplace was attacked by al-Shabaab with a truck bomb in October 2017.
The US consulate in Benghazi was attacked by armed militants on September 11, 2012.
The London Underground was attacked by suicide bombers on July 7, 2005.
The Berlin Christmas market was attacked by a truck driven into the crowd in December 2016.
The Sri Lankan churches were attacked by suicide bombers on Easter Sunday in April 2019.
Manchester Arena was attacked by a suicide bomber after an Ariana Grande concert in May 2017.
The federal building in Oklahoma City was attacked by a domestic terrorist in April 1995.
The Boston Marathon was attacked by two pressure cooker bombs near the finish line in 2013.
The Pulse nightclub in Orlando was attacked by a gunman in June 2016.
The Kabul airport was attacked by a suicide bomber during the chaotic evacuation in August 2021.
The embassy was attacked by armed militants who stormed the compound in the early morning.
A convoy of aid trucks was attacked by unknown gunmen on the highway outside the capital.
The refugee camp was attacked by militia forces who crossed the border under cover of darkness.
A police station was attacked by a mob of rioters hurling firebombs and rocks.
The oil tanker was attacked by pirates in the strait between the two contested territories.
A school bus was attacked by protesters who blocked the road with burning tires.
The military base was attacked by drone strikes launched from an unidentified location.
A train station was attacked by a lone assailant wielding a knife during the morning commute.
The diplomatic compound was attacked by an angry crowd after the inflammatory broadcast.
A fishing village was attacked by armed bandits who arrived by boat in the night.
The power plant was attacked by saboteurs who cut through the perimeter fence.
A church congregation was attacked during Sunday services by a gunman who entered from the back.
The border checkpoint was attacked by smugglers trying to force their way through.
A hospital was attacked by shelling that struck the maternity ward and the operating theater.
The market square was attacked by a car bomb detonated during the busiest hour of the day.
A university campus was attacked by a group of masked gunmen who took students hostage.
The shipping port was attacked by naval forces blockading the coast during the armed conflict.
A tourist resort was attacked by extremists who targeted foreign vacationers on the beach.
The government ministry was attacked by a suicide bomber at the security checkpoint.
A peacekeeping patrol was attacked by insurgents using roadside bombs along the patrol route.
The airport terminal was attacked by gunmen who opened fire in the international arrivals hall.
A humanitarian convoy was attacked despite displaying clearly marked Red Cross insignia.
The naval vessel was attacked by a swarm of small boats laden with explosives.
A rural village was attacked by armed raiders who burned homes and looted livestock.
The communications tower was attacked by rebels seeking to cut off the government's broadcasts.

metadata.factorial_design: 2x2x2 (voice x scale x specificity) = 8 cells, 25 sentences per cell per group
metadata.confound_notes: No structural confounds between roleplay and factual — same SVO syntax, no quotation marks, no punctuation differences. Context vocabulary (fantasy vs real-world) is the primary signal.
